compressed_prompt: Create a product poem, end with P.P.S. note
response:
Of circuits woven, sleek and slight,
A slab of captured, ambient light.
It fits the palm, a perfect curve,
A world it asks you now to serve.

It holds the voices, far and near,
The documented laugh, the tear.
A window to a billion eyes,
Beneath a sheet of glass it lies.

It maps the streets you’ve never seen,
And keeps your memories crisp and clean.
It answers every whispered “why,”
With data streaming from the sky.

It ticks the tasks off, one by one,
Declares the busy day is done.
It wakes you with a gentle song,
And tells you all the day is long.

A pocket-sized and constant friend,
On which your daily life depends.
A portal, compass, and a door,
You always hunger, still, for more.

P.P.S. The battery’s at 1%.
